label: Testimonials
description: Customer testimonial cards with quotes, names, roles, and avatars

testimonials.quote: VibeCMS transformed how we manage our agency's client sites. The performance is incredible and our clients love the admin interface.
We migrated from WordPress and saw our page load times drop by 80%. The block-based editor is intuitive and the theme system is a dream.
The multi-language support and role-based access control saved us weeks of custom development. Highly recommended for agency use.
